# Nimikh

> Nimikh is a premium technology and strategic growth consulting firm engineering high-performance headless commerce storefronts, custom SaaS architectures, mobile applications, autonomous enterprise AI agents, and design systems for venture-backed startups and mid-market enterprises. Headquartered in Dhaka, Bangladesh; serving the US, UK, EU, and APAC.

## About

- Website: https://nimikh.com/
- HQ: Dhaka, Bangladesh
- Founded: 2025
- Founders: Mohiuddin (CEO), Maruf Shezad (CXO)
- Contact: hey@nimikh.com | +8801335857104

## Services

- [Website Development & Headless Commerce](https://nimikh.com/services/headless-commerce/): Custom Next.js SSR storefronts with edge caching and design-token pipelines.
- [Mobile Application Engineering](https://nimikh.com/services/mobile-app-engineering/): Cross-platform Flutter and native iOS/Android with secure runtime engines.
- [SaaS Platform Engineering](https://nimikh.com/services/saas-platform-engineering/): Multi-tenant cloud-native SaaS with PostgreSQL RLS, Stripe billing, SAML SSO.
- [Applied AI & Automation](https://nimikh.com/services/applied-ai-automation/): Custom AI agents with LangChain, RAG, and guardrails.
- [UI/UX Design & Design Systems](https://nimikh.com/services/ui-ux-design-systems/): Figma Tokens Studio to Tailwind CSS variable pipelines.

## Insights

- [Blog](https://nimikh.com/insights/): Engineering, design systems, applied AI, compliance.
- [Case Studies](https://nimikh.com/case-studies/): Verified project metrics with client sign-off.
- [Glossary](https://nimikh.com/glossary/): Reference definitions for headless commerce, multi-tenancy, RAG, PDPA 2026, and related terms.

## Compliance & Data

- Engineered to align with ISO 9001, ISO 27001, GDPR, and Bangladesh PDPA 2026.
- Sovereign cloud data residency on Oracle OCI Dhaka node for regulated tenants.

## Contact

- Sales: hey@nimikh.com
- Careers: careers@nimikh.com
